---
title: "Our Team"
page-layout: full
---

## Principal Investigator

::: {.grid} 

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .h-100 .text-center .shadow-sm .member-card}
::: {.card-body}
<img src="images/test.jpg" alt="Natalie Beenaerts" class="rounded-circle mb-3" style="width: 120px; height: 120px; object-fit: cover; border: 3px solid var(--bs-primary);">

### Prof. Dr. Natalie Beenaerts {.h4 .mt-0}
**Professor - head of the Field Research Centre**  

<a href="people/NatalieBeenaerts.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm mt-3">View Profile & Pubs</a>
:::
:::
:::

::: 


## PhD researchers

::: {.grid} 

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .h-100 .text-center .shadow-sm .member-card}
::: {.card-body}
<img src="images/test.jpg" alt="Imke Tomsin" class="rounded-circle mb-3" style="width: 120px; height: 120px; object-fit: cover; border: 3px solid var(--bs-primary);">

### Imke Tomsin {.h4 .mt-0}
**PhD researcher**  

[Research focus: mechanistic modelling to assess wildlife management strategies]{.small .text-muted}

<a href="people/ImkeTomsin.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm mt-3">Learn more</a>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .h-100 .text-center .shadow-sm .member-card}
::: {.card-body}
<img src="images/test.jpg" alt="Wim Kuypers" class="rounded-circle mb-3" style="width: 120px; height: 120px; object-fit: cover; border: 3px solid var(--bs-primary);">

### Wim Kuypers {.h4 .mt-0}
**PhD researcher**  

[Research focus: influence of human disturbance on spatiotemporal behaviour of wildlife]{.small .text-muted}

<a href="people/WimKuypers.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm mt-3">Learn more</a>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.card .h-100 .text-center .shadow-sm .member-card}
::: {.card-body}
<img src="images/test.jpg" alt="Siebe Indestege" class="rounded-circle mb-3" style="width: 120px; height: 120px; object-fit: cover; border: 3px solid var(--bs-primary);">

### Siebe Indestege {.h4 .mt-0}
**PhD researcher**  

[Research focus: biologger and camera trapping methodology to study spatiotemporal behaviour of wildlife]{.small .text-muted}

<a href="people/SiebeIndestege.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm mt-3">Learn more</a>
:::
:::
:::

:::

## Co-supervised PhD students 

### Eliana Muccio

## Past collaborations 

### PhD's 
* **Dr. Jolien Wevers** (....-....)
* **Dr. Martijn Bollen** (....-....)

### Master students 
* Annelien Vantomme (2025-2026)

### Bachelor students
* Lisa Bongaers (2025-2026)
* Robbe Van Assche (2025-2026)
* Giel Maesen (2025-2026)
